languages.text: {n}Иждриг хмурится и издает странный звук, похожий одновременно на ворчание и рык, но лишенный агрессии.{/n} "Скучаю. Я там родился, вырос и несколько раз чуть не умер. Там я знал, что делать, а в большом мире — нет". {n}Ваши взгляды пересекаются и вы замечаете искры в глубине зеленых глаз. Внезапно полковник ухмыляется.{/n} "И это хорошо. Я чувствую, что помолодел. Снова надо учиться, приспосабливаться, думать, а не отдавать одни и те же приказы день за днем. Это будоражит кровь".

{n}Izdrig frowns and lets out a strange sound, a mix of grunt and growl, yet devoid of any aggression.{/n} "I miss it. I was born there, grew up there, and nearly died there more than once. Back home, I knew what to do, but in the wider world — I don't." {n}Your eyes meet, and you catch a glint deep within his green eyes. Suddenly, the colonel smirks.{/n} "And that's a good thing. I feel like I've grown younger. I have to learn, adapt, and think all over again, instead of giving the same orders day after day. It stirs the blood."

I feel like I've grown younger. I have to learn, adapt, and think all over again, instead of giving the same orders day after day. It stirs the blood."

Back home, I knew what to do, but in the wider world — I don't." {n}Your eyes meet, and you catch a glint deep within his green eyes. Suddenly, the colonel smirks.{/n} "And that's a good thing. I feel like I've grown younger. I have to learn, adapt, and think all over again, instead of giving the same orders day after day. It stirs the blood."

"The dangers of my planet were familiar to me. I knew what to do, how to protect my soldiers. But out here in the wider world, I don't. So yes, I felt more at ease on Zarkov. But you know what? I feel like the years have fallen off me. Needing to learn and adapt stirs the blood. I'd go so far as to say I like it."

I feel like I've grown younger. I have to learn, adapt, and think all over again, instead of giving the same orders day after day. It stirs the blood."

languages.text: 「私の故郷の危険はよく知っていた。兵士を守る方法もわかっていた。しかし、この広い世界では、何もわからない。だから、ザルコフでは安心していた。でも、知ってる？歳を取った気がしない。学ぶこと、適応することによって、血が騒ぐ。好きだと言えるほどだ」
languages.original_text: "The dangers of my planet were familiar to me. I knew what to do, how to protect my soldiers. But out here in the wider world, I don't. So yes, I felt more at ease on Zarkov. But you know what? I feel like the years have fallen off me. Needing to learn and adapt stirs the blood. I'd go so far as to say I like it."

languages.text: {n}İzdrig, kaşlarını çatıyor ve homurtu ile hırlama karışımı, ancak her türlü saldırganlıktan uzak tuhaf bir ses çıkarıyor.{/n} "Özlüyorum. Orada doğdum, orada büyüdüm ve orada birden fazla kez ölümden döndüm. Evimde ne yapacağımı biliyordum ama bu geniş dünyada. Bilmiyorum." {n}Göz göze geliyorsunuz. Yeşil gözlerinin derinliklerinde bir parıltı yakalıyorsun. Albay aniden gülümsüyor.{/n} "Bu iyi bir şey. Gençleşmiş gibiyim. Her gün aynı emirleri vermek yerine yeniden öğrenmem, uyum sağlamam ve düşünmem gerekiyor. Bu insanın kanını kaynatıyor."
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig frowns and lets out a strange sound, a mix of grunt and growl, yet devoid of any aggression.{/n} "I miss it. I was born there, grew up there, and nearly died there more than once. Back home, I knew what to do, but in the wider world — I don't." {n}Your eyes meet, and you catch a glint deep within his green eyes. Suddenly, the colonel smirks.{/n} "And that's a good thing. I feel like I've grown younger. I have to learn, adapt, and think all over again, instead of giving the same orders day after day. It stirs the blood."

languages.text: {n}伊兹德里格皱起眉头，发出了古怪的声音，像是闷哼又像低吼，但其中并无敌意。{/n}“我想念那里。我在那里出生，在那里长大，还不止一次差点死在那儿。在家乡，我知道该怎么做，但在这更广阔的世界里，我反倒不知道了。”{n}你与他对视，在他那双绿眼睛深处捕捉到一丝光芒。忽然，上校露出一抹笑意。{/n}“不过这也是好事。我感觉自己变年轻了。我必须从头学起、去适应、去思考，而不是日复一日下达同样的命令。这让我热血沸腾。”
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig frowns and lets out a strange sound, a mix of grunt and growl, yet devoid of any aggression.{/n} "I miss it. I was born there, grew up there, and nearly died there more than once. Back home, I knew what to do, but in the wider world — I don't." {n}Your eyes meet, and you catch a glint deep within his green eyes. Suddenly, the colonel smirks.{/n} "And that's a good thing. I feel like I've grown younger. I have to learn, adapt, and think all over again, instead of giving the same orders day after day. It stirs the blood."

languages.text: {n}Izdrig runzelt die Stirn und stößt eine seltsame Kombination aus Stöhnen und Knurren aus, die allerdings nicht aggressiv wirkt.{/n} "Ich vermisse es. Ich bin dort geboren, aufgewachsen und einige Male beinahe gestorben. Allerdings wusste ich zu Hause, was ich tun muss, das ist in der größeren Welt ... nicht so." {n}Als sich eure Blicke treffen, siehst du ein Funkeln in seinen grünen Augen. Plötzlich beginnt der Colonel zu grinsen.{/n} "Und das ist gut. Ich fühle mich gleich jünger. Ich muss lernen, mich anpassen und alles neu durchdenken, anstatt Tag für Tag dieselben Befehle zu erteilen. Das bringt das Blut in Wallung."
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig frowns and lets out a strange sound, a mix of grunt and growl, yet devoid of any aggression.{/n} "I miss it. Allerdings wusste ich zu Hause, was ich tun muss, das ist in der größeren Welt ... nicht so." {n}Als sich eure Blicke treffen, siehst du ein Funkeln in seinen grünen Augen. Ich muss lernen, mich anpassen und alles neu durchdenken, anstatt Tag für Tag dieselben Befehle zu erteilen. Das bringt das Blut in Wallung."

languages.text: {n}Izdrig fronce les sourcils et lâche un son ressemblant à un grognement dénué d'agressivité.{/n} « Ma planète me manque. J'y suis né, j'y ai grandi et j'ai bien failli y mourir plusieurs fois. Chez moi, je savais quoi faire, mais ici, bien au-delà de mon monde, je suis perdu. » {n}Vos regards se croisent. Vous apercevez une lueur dans ses yeux verts. Tout à coup, le colonel sourit.{/n} « C'est une bonne chose. J'ai comme l'impression d'avoir rajeuni. Je dois apprendre, m'adapter et complètement revoir ma façon de penser au lieu de donner les mêmes ordres jour après jour. Je me sens vivant. »
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig frowns and lets out a strange sound, a mix of grunt and growl, yet devoid of any aggression.{/n} "I miss it. I was born there, grew up there, and nearly died there more than once. Back home, I knew what to do, but in the wider world — I don't." {n}Your eyes meet, and you catch a glint deep within his green eyes. Suddenly, the colonel smirks.{/n} "And that's a good thing. I feel like I've grown younger. I have to learn, adapt, and think all over again, instead of giving the same orders day after day. It stirs the blood."

J'y suis né, j'y ai grandi et j'ai bien failli y mourir plusieurs fois. Chez moi, je savais quoi faire, mais ici, bien au-delà de mon monde, je suis perdu. » {n}Vos regards se croisent. Vous apercevez une lueur dans ses yeux verts. Tout à coup, le colonel sourit.{/n} « C'est une bonne chose. J'ai comme l'impression d'avoir rajeuni. Je dois apprendre, m'adapter et complètement revoir ma façon de penser au lieu de donner les mêmes ordres jour après jour. Je me sens vivant. »

languages.text: {n}Izdrig frunce el ceño y deja escapar un sonido extraño; una mezcla de gruñido y resoplido que no contiene agresividad en absoluto.{/n} «Lo echo de menos. Nací allí, crecí allí y casi muero allí en más de una ocasión. En casa, sabía qué hacer, pero, en este mundo más grande... no». {n}Vuestras miradas se cruzan y captas un brillo en las profundidades de sus ojos. De repente, el coronel sonríe.{/n} «Y eso es bueno. Es como si hubiera rejuvenecido. Tengo que aprender, adaptarme y pensar una vez más, en vez de seguir dando las mismas órdenes cada día. Eso estimula el espíritu».
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig frowns and lets out a strange sound, a mix of grunt and growl, yet devoid of any aggression.{/n} "I miss it.
